creator: bond@techno-r.ru
text:
Hello bug-followup,

  I am getting this bug too.
  System freeze - ping to system is ok, but ssh,www service not
  responding.
Also in /var/log/messages many messages:
Nov 19 15:00:00 mr2 kernel: dummynet: waking up pipe 1021 at 0
Nov 19 15:00:00 mr2 kernel: dummynet: waking up pipe 1021 at 0                  
Nov 19 15:00:00 mr2 kernel: dummynet: waking up pipe 1020 at 28

Nov 19 15:00:01 mr2 kernel: dummynet: waking up pipe 1020 at 28

i am reset system by power key, but flood to /var/log/messges
continues...
